info.title: HealthTrackerApp
info.description: HealthTracker is a web apis for tracking your health metrics.

post.description: Create a login account. Role determines what the account can later access.
Exchange a username/password for a bearer token (OAuth2 password flow).

Create a new patient profile. Patients are always linked to their own
account; provider/admin callers must supply user_id for the account
being onboarded.

get.description: List patients, with basic pagination. Provider/admin only.
Get a single patient's profile by id.

parameters.name: patient_id

schema.description: ID of the patient to retrieve
schema.title: Patient Id

parameters.description: ID of the patient to retrieve

parameters.name: patient_id

schema.description: ID of the patient to update
schema.title: Patient Id

parameters.description: ID of the patient to update

delete.description: Delete a patient profile. Provider/admin only -- not self-service.

parameters.name: patient_id

schema.description: ID of the patient to delete
schema.title: Patient Id

parameters.description: ID of the patient to delete

post.description: Record a new vital sign reading.

get.description:
List vital sign readings for a patient, most recent first. Optionally
filter to a date range with start/end.

parameters.name: patient_id

schema.description: ID of the patient whose vital signs to retrieve
schema.title: Patient Id

parameters.description: ID of the patient whose vital signs to retrieve

parameters.name: start

schema.description: Only include readings recorded at/after this timestamp
schema.title: Start

parameters.description: Only include readings recorded at/after this timestamp

parameters.name: end

schema.description: Only include readings recorded at/before this timestamp
schema.title: End

parameters.description: Only include readings recorded at/before this timestamp

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of records to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Number of records to skip, for pagination
schema.title: Offset

parameters.description: Number of records to skip, for pagination

schema.title: Response List Vital Signs Vital Signs  Get

get.description: Get a single vital sign reading by id.

parameters.name: vital_signs_id

schema.description: ID of the vital sign reading to retrieve
schema.title: Vital Signs Id

parameters.description: ID of the vital sign reading to retrieve

post.description: Record new activity data (steps, active minutes) for a patient.

get.description:
List activity data for a patient, most recent first. Optionally
filter to a date range with start/end.

parameters.name: start

schema.description: Only include records at/after this timestamp
schema.title: Start

parameters.description: Only include records at/after this timestamp

parameters.name: end

schema.description: Only include records at/before this timestamp
schema.title: End

parameters.description: Only include records at/before this timestamp

schema.title: Response List Activity Data Activity Data  Get

get.description: Get a single activity data record by id.

post.description: Set a threshold for one metric (e.g. heart_rate) for a patient.

get.description: List all configured thresholds for a patient.

parameters.name: patient_id

schema.description: ID of the patient whose alert thresholds to retrieve
schema.title: Patient Id

parameters.description: ID of the patient whose alert thresholds to retrieve

schema.title: Response List Alert Thresholds Alert Thresholds  Get

parameters.name: threshold_id

schema.description: ID of the alert threshold to update
schema.title: Threshold Id

parameters.description: ID of the alert threshold to update

parameters.name: threshold_id

schema.description: ID of the alert threshold to delete
schema.title: Threshold Id

parameters.description: ID of the alert threshold to delete

post.description:
Create an alert. In Phase 4 this is called by the rule engine when a
reading crosses a threshold, rather than by a client directly.

get.description: List alerts, optionally filtered by patient and/or status.

parameters.name: patient_id

schema.description: ID of the patient whose alerts to retrieve
schema.title: Patient Id

parameters.description: ID of the patient whose alerts to retrieve

parameters.name: status_filter

schema.description: Filter alerts by status
schema.title: Status Filter

parameters.description: Filter alerts by status

get.description: Get a single alert by id.

parameters.name: alert_id

schema.description: ID of the alert to retrieve
schema.title: Alert Id

parameters.description: ID of the alert to retrieve

parameters.name: alert_id

schema.description: ID of the alert to update
schema.title: Alert Id

parameters.description: ID of the alert to update

post.description:
Store a newly calculated risk score. In Phase 5 this is called by the
scoring model rather than by a client directly.

get.description:
Get risk score(s) for a patient. By default returns just the most
recent score; pass history=true for the full trend.

parameters.name: patient_id

schema.description: ID of the patient whose risk score to retrieve
schema.title: Patient Id

parameters.description: ID of the patient whose risk score to retrieve

parameters.name: history

schema.description: Whether to retrieve the full risk score history for the patient
schema.title: History

parameters.description: Whether to retrieve the full risk score history for the patient

schema.title: Response List Risk Scores Risk Scores  Get

get.description: Get a single risk score record by id.

parameters.name: risk_score_id

schema.description: ID of the risk score to retrieve
schema.title: Risk Score Id

parameters.description: ID of the risk score to retrieve

acknowledged_by.title: Acknowledged By
acknowledged_by.description: User id of the staff member handling this alert

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: Login account (users.id) this patient profile is linked to. Defaults to the caller's own account; only provider/admin callers may set this to link a different account.

role.title: Role
role.description: Account role; determines what this login can access
